feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP FIORI APP upgrade impact analysis
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We have upgraded SAP S/4HANA (Sandbox) from 1909 to 2023 FPS2. As we went through the post checks, we have found the following issue.

Made a spot check of F0928A which according to the analysis should not be available. This turned out not to be true, also the Readiness check report did not contain information about the app being unavailable.

  • Fiori apps extracted from our roles and analyzed in the Fiori upgrade impact analysis tool as provided by SAP
  • A list of 41 unavailable APPs identified
  • Random APP amongst the 41 checked in our system and is still seemingly working just fine.

Questions:

  • Are the APPs in the list still available but “not recommended”?
  • Is the list not accurate, “false positives”?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Why is there no Order field for 933 goods movement via MIGO (replaces MB1A in S4HANA)?
entry.content:
When I try to create a 933 goods movement using MIGO transaction in place of MB1A (Obsolete in S4HANA) I see only one field to enter Cost center and no field to enter internal order.  Why is the Order field missing?  If this is intended, please provide the process that may be used to create a 933 goods movement with an internal order.  See screenshot below where I expected to see the internal Order field in MIGO.

MIGO - no Order field exists:

MB1A - Order field exists:

entry.title: Best Approach to Trigger SAP CPI Interface Periodically from S/4HANA with Dynamic Plant/S.Loc
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement where a SAP CPI interface needs to be triggered once or twice daily. This interface performs the following:

--Accepts Plant and Storage Location as input.

--Fetches product data using an OData API in S/4HANA and some additional info from other APIs.

--Sends the final data to a target system.

What we initially considered:

Timer-based iFlow in CPI, with plant and storage location maintained as externalized parameters in a content modifier.

----Rejected by the team due to manual effort involved in changing parameters each time we want to trigger for different plant/storage location.

SAP BTP Job Scheduler: Allows periodic triggering and could call a CPI endpoint with required parameters. Currently in discussion. If selected, the job would pass Plant and Storage Location as part of the payload to CPI.

S/4HANA-triggered interface via SOAP/IDoc: S/4 can periodically send data (plant and storage location) via a custom ABAP job, which triggers a CPI endpoint using SOAP or sends an IDoc. This seems promising, but I would like to know what’s more standard/recommended.

Constraints:

We cannot use custom Z-tables in S/4HANA to manage or store configuration.

CPI as a public API for third-party to call isn’t suitable, as the source system must be S/4 or CI.

Event Mesh is not applicable here, since there is no real-time change or event-based trigger. It’s purely a periodic push.

My Questions:

1) Between BTP Job Scheduler and S/4HANA SOAP/IDoc push, which would be more recommended and scalable?

2) Are there any other better or more standard options to periodically trigger a CPI interface with dynamic parameters like plant and storage location?

entry.title: How to filter the list when the column is 1:n relation
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create a webapp using SAP Business Application Studio in BTP. 

The app is connected to S4 HANA Cloud system using oData v2 API

I have view which is a list of products. I want to add a search box to filter the result by Production Description column. Production and Product Description has 1:n relation.

I am using the below source codes. But it doesn't work. 

I get the error in the console - Error during request to remote service: Left hand expression of memberaccess operator has wrong cardinality (to many not allowed)

Can someone please help me?

 

                var aTableSearchState =[];
                var sQuery = oEvent.getParameter("query");

                if (sQuery && sQuery.length > 0) {
                    var ProductTypeFilter = new Filter("ProductType", FilterOperator.Contains, sQuery);
                    var MaterialFilter = new Filter("Material", FilterOperator.Contains, sQuery);
                    var LanguageFilter = new Filter("to_Description/Language", FilterOperator.EQ, 'EN');
                    var DescriptionFilter = new Filter("to_Description/Description", FilterOperator.Contains, sQuery);
                    var QueryFilter1 = new Filter({ filters:[LanguageFilter, DescriptionFilter], and: true});
                    //var QueryFilter = new Filter({ filters:[ProductTypeFilter, MaterialFilter], and: false});
                    var QueryFilter = new Filter({ filters:[ProductTypeFilter, MaterialFilter, QueryFilter1], and: false});
                    aTableSearchState.push(QueryFilter);
                }
                this._applySearch(aTableSearchState);
 
         
_applySearch: function(aTableSearchState) {
          
           var oTable = this.byId("table"),
           oViewModel = this.getModel("worklistView");
            oTable.getBinding("items").filter(aTableSearchState, "Application");
            // changes the noDataText of the list in case there are no filter results
            if (aTableSearchState.length !== 0) {
                oViewModel.setProperty("/tableNoDataText", this.getResourceBundle().getText("worklistNoDataWithSearchText"));
            }

        }

entry.title: Assistance Required for Assignment Field Update in Vendor Line Item during MIRO Posting
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

Good day!.

We have a requirement to populate the Assignment field (PO Number) in the vendor line item during MIRO posting, using the value from the Assignment field of the GR line item. However, we are currently unable to identify a suitable enhancement spot to implement this change.

Ideally, the Assignment field in the vendor line item should be automatically updated based on the Sort Key maintained in the vendor master data. Unfortunately, this is not happening. The Assignment field is only being populated correctly for the GR line item, based on the GL account"s Sort Key.

We would appreciate your support in either of the following:

  1. Understanding why the Assignment field is not being updated in the vendor line item as expected.
  2. Identifying a suitable enhancement spot, BADI, or user exit where we can implement the required logic.

We have already tried the following BADIs and user exits, but none have worked for our scenario.

BADIs:

 

ACC_DOCUMENT

INVOICE_UPDATE

Exits:

 

LMR1M001

 

EXIT_SAPLMR1M_002

EXIT_SAPLMR1M_003

EXIT_SAPLMRMP_010

LMR1M003

 

EXIT_SAPLMRME_003

LMR1M004

 

EXIT_SAPLMRMP_004

LMR1M005

 

EXIT_SAPLMRMC_002

LMR1M006

 

EXIT_SAPLMRM_BAPI_001

MRMH0001

 

EXIT_SAPLMRMH_001

EXIT_SAPLMRMH_002

MRMH0002

 

EXIT_SAPLMRMH_011

EXIT_SAPLMRMH_012

EXIT_SAPLMRMH_013

EXIT_SAPLMRMH_014

EXIT_SAPLMRMH_015

MRMH0003

 

EXIT_RMMR1MRB_001

EXIT_RMMR1MRB_002

MRMN0001

 

EXIT_SAPLMRMN_001

EXIT_SAPLMRMN_002

EXIT_SAPLMRMN_003

Thanks

Srinivasu

entry.title: Sales order availability check
entry.content:
We have a strange issue where sales order quantity is not getting confirmed for few sales order line items.

We have a delivery job setup which is causing partial deliveries created for few items as few line items are not confirmed automaically.

We want confirmed quantity to be detemined for all the line items at the same time so single delivery is created.

 

Even the Schedule line configuration(VOV5) does not have the availability check enabled, still we are facing this.

 

Also this is not happening for all the sales order, its random as pee our initial understanding.

any pointers will be really helpful.

 

We have enough stock and manual retrigger of availibility check in VA02 is solving the problem.

 

PS- Our system was recently upgraded to S4 2023 and seems we are facing it post the upgrade.

 

Regards

Akshay

entry.title: Extended Sourcing for Public Sector for S/4 Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
I read about an "Extended Sourcing for Public Sector", that is announced for Q4 2025, in the SAP Industry Solution Portfolio website (ext. link) .

I would like to confirm if it will be available for S/4 Cloud Public Edition. There is an entry for S/4 (ext. link) and S/4 CLD Private (ext. link), but it does not mention S/4 CLD Public specifically.

Another question is what "S/4 PPS" stands for. Inside the links, it mentions "SAP Ariba Sourcing and Procurement for Public Sector in SAP S/4HANA", but it confuses me because it mentions both Ariba and S/4. I would like to know more about this solution, but I found nothing.

entry.title: Reason:UI5 is not installed or the sap-ui-version.json file is corrupted
entry.content:
Dear Sap we have issue seems SAP_UI is corrupted nting is working saml2/soamager all giving error 

Unable to retrieve UI5 version information from MIME repository

Message no. /UI5/CM_LOG003

entry.title: Sales org specific number range for Settlement Document in Condition Contract Management CCM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement to configure Sales org wise number ranges for Settlement Document in Condition Contracts Management. We have around 20 sales organization in the system, whenever the settlement document is created, the settlement document should be created with number range based on the Sales Organization. We do automatic settlement, manual settlement, Settlement reversal. Request to share the steps to do the configuration in the system.

Thank you in advance.

#Settlement Management   SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales   SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: How to change the background user for SAP Cloud ALM jobs current scheduled?
entry.content:
Hello SAP support,

Is there any quick way to change an user for all the use-case jobs currently scheduled?
Or I have to do it manually for every released job via SM37?

 

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Percentage of Completion (POC) and Completed Contract Basis (CCB)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'd like to confirm my understanding of how revenue recognition works in SAP using Percentage of Completion (POC) and Completed Contract Basis (CCB) approaches. Can someone please tell me if the following flow is correct?

[POC: Percentage of Completion]

  1. MM Goods Receipt
    The finished product is received into inventory.
    Journal entry:
    Inventory / GR/IR

  2. SD Delivery
    When the product is delivered, it is issued from inventory and recorded as Cost of Sales.
    Journal entry:
    Cost of Sales / Inventory

  3. PS Result Analysis (Cost Transfer)
    The cost initially booked to Cost of Sales is transferred to WIP (Work in Progress) via PS.
    Journal entry:
    WIP / Cost of Sales

  4. PS Result Analysis (Progress-based Revenue Recognition)
    Revenue and receivables are recognized based on the progress percentage. This is an internal accounting entry, separate from SD billing.
    Journal entry:
    Accounts Receivable / Revenue

  5. SD Billing (Final Customer Invoice in the Closing Period)
    When SD billing is finally executed (typically in the final period), another entry for revenue and receivable is posted.
    Journal entry:
    Accounts Receivable / Revenue
    (Note: This revenue is separate from the one recognized in step 4.)

[CCB: Completed Contract Basis]

  1. MM Goods Receipt
    The finished product is received into inventory.
    Journal entry:
    Inventory / GR/IR

  2. SD Delivery
    Upon delivery, the product is issued from inventory and booked as Cost of Sales.
    Journal entry:
    Cost of Sales / Inventory

  3. PS Result Analysis (Cost Transfer)
    The cost is transferred to WIP using PS result analysis.
    Journal entry:
    WIP / Cost of Sales

  4. SD Billing (Upon Project Completion)
    In the completion period, billing is executed and revenue is recognized in full.
    Journal entry:
    Accounts Receivable / Revenue

Is this understanding correct for handling revenue recognition in SAP projects with SD, MM, and PS integration?
Any feedback or corrections would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: BRF+ OPD Sales Order Confirmation EDI Print Output
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I am trying to setup BRF+ OPD setup for order confirmation. After doing all necessary steps of configuration, I am getting an error message. Can anyone help me to resolve these error

Sales Order Confirmation:

EDI: SOAP API B2B: S/4Hana on premises (not S/4 Hana public cloud)

Error: No active outbound service for appl. obj. <Sales Order No>, outp. type ORDER_CONFIRMATION, BuPa <Business Partner No>

SAP Error Code: APOC_OR_MESSAGES404

Print:  Can anyone tell me Standard Sales Order confirmation print form template name?

Thanks,

Arindam Sur

entry.title: Integration of SAP FSM with S/4HANA and C4C via CPI for Equipment Creation
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

We have a requirement to integrate SAP Field Service Management (FSM) with SAP S/4HANA and SAP Cloud for Customer (C4C) systems using SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) as the middleware.

Requirement:
When an Equipment is created in SAP FSM, the same equipment should automatically be created in both S/4HANA and C4C systems.

Help Required:
How to configure the communication arrangement in SAP FSM to trigger the Equipment creation event to CPI?
Are there any standard APIs in FSM that we need to configure to send Equipment creation data to CPI?
Kindly Help.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Integration of SAP FSM with S/4HANA and C4C via CPI for Equipment Creation
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

We have a requirement to integrate SAP Field Service Management (FSM) with SAP S/4HANA and SAP Cloud for Customer (C4C) systems using SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) as the middleware.

Requirement:
When an Equipment is created in SAP FSM, the same equipment should automatically be created in both S/4HANA and C4C systems.

Help Required:
How to configure the communication arrangement in SAP FSM to trigger the Equipment creation event to CPI?
Are there any standard APIs in FSM that we need to configure to send Equipment creation data to CPI?
Kindly Help.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Add Field Reception Point (EMPST) at Item Level in Standard Application Template ID F4293
entry.content: We are currently wanted to use the standard SAP Fiori application with Template ID F4293 and require the inclusion of the field Reception Point (EMPST) at the item level. This field is essential for our business. We would like to request guidance or documentation on how this field can be integrated into the standard application template, or if there is any recommended enhancement approach provided by SAP to achieve this requirement.

entry.title: How to obtain License Key to S/4 HANA On-Premise Systems?
entry.content:
Hello,

How can I obtain a License Key to SAP S/4 HANA On-Premise Systems?

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Does SAP recommend to have same PSE for both SAP SSL Server Standard and SAP SSL Client ?
entry.content: Does SAP recommend to have same PSE for both SAP SSL Server Standard and SAP SSL Client Standard in STRUST ? Can we copy the SSL Server PSE to SSL Client Standard ? If so, is this recommended by SAP ?

entry.title: Best Practices for Removing Firefighter ID Owner in SAP GRC
entry.content:
We encountered an issue where a Firefighter ID was assigned to an owner and could not be deleted. We successfully resolved the issue by removing entries from NWBC → Setup → Emergency Access Assignment → Firefighter IDs.

While we have identified the solution, we would like to ensure that we are following SAP-recommended best practices to avoid any unintended consequences, such as:

  • Impact on historical logs and audit trails

  • Potential system inconsistencies or dependencies

  • Recommended validation steps before deletion

Request:

Could you provide SAP"s official best practices for safely removing Firefighter ID assignments while maintaining compliance and system integrity? If there are specific SAP Notes or guidelines, please share them.

System Details:

  • SAP GRC Version: AC FOR S/4HANA V8100 SP 17 (06/2022)

entry.title: error in PREP_CHKIMPORT/INTCHK_IMP SUM phase
entry.content:
error in sum phase : PREP_CHKIMPORT/INTCHK_IMP 

Found 5745 entries in DDXTT. All entries are listed in log file CHECK_INACTNT_DDXTT.LOG.

entry.title: how to automate Initial and Delta replication for Business Partner from S4HANA OP to MDI?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have configured all required steps to replicate Business Partner Master Data from S4HANA OP system to MDI. 

1. SOAP and DRF Configurations in S4HANA OP

2. BDO Configurations in MDI BTP Tenant

3. Destinations in S4HANA OP and MDI BTP Tenant with CC configurations.

Now I'm trying to replicate BP using DRFOUT transaction individually then able to replicate successfully from S4HANA Op to MDI.

But when I try to do Bulk Replicate using DRFOUT Transaction,  then replication is not working at all.

Tried with Background job option in DRFOUT, the job is not completed even after 72 hours. 

Can anyone please guide me the best way to automate Initial and Delta Replicate option in S4HANA OP system.

Regards,

Ramana.
